---
title: "Clinical tools"
pagetitle: "Clinical tools — Foundation Stack"
description: "Standalone helpers for adolescent PPCS aerobic prescription — educational only, linked from Foundation Stack installments."
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - "hr-calculator/index.qmd"
  sort: "title asc"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description, tool_status, related_installments]
  field-display-names:
    title: Tool
    description: Summary
    tool_status: Status
    related_installments: From installment
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.fs-hero}
## Clinical tools

**Action helpers · separate from installments**

These pages convert published ranges into numbers you can use in clinic or at home. They are **not** medical advice and **do not** pick a single “correct” prescription—the [installments](/index.html) explain why the literature disagrees.
:::

## How tools relate to articles

| Track | URL | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| **Installments** | `/posts/…` | PMID-backed argument, tables, SOP prose |
| **Tools** | `/tools/…` | Calculators and checklists with warnings up front |
| **Pillar 4 (future)** | `/posts/pillar4-…` | Pitfalls and Monday-morning SOPs may link here |

Installments **link out** to tools; tools **link back** to the installment that motivated them. Widgets are never embedded inside long-form posts.

## Available tools

[← Series hub](/index.html)
